text:
Created attachment 244783
shar archive

> - For ports that have the option to support graphics output, it may be useful
   to provide flavors, so binary packages both with and without graphics will be 
   built.  Otherwise users wishing to install non-graphics when graphics are the
   default would have to build from source.  Please check if it makes sense to
   use flavors for this port and if so, define appropriate flavors.

Added the non-SDL ports.

SDL is disabled on this ports, but graphic and audio function
is usable by a limited function.
